overview: The Village of Weston Tourism Commission held its reorganization meeting, electing new officers and approving a $5,000 grant for the Taste and Glow Balloonfest. The commission learned that a competing hot air balloon event in Marshfield was canceled, potentially boosting attendance at the local festival.

agenda.item: Call to order and Pledge of Allegiance
New business - Grant request for Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Remarks from staff and commission members

discussions.body: Trustee Erling was nominated and elected as Chair. Cushing was nominated for Vice Chair with Jackson providing the second; motion passed. Renee was nominated and elected as Secretary. All elections passed unanimously.
The minutes from the April 21st meeting were approved. Motion was seconded by Renee and passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Grant Request - Taste and Glow Balloonfest
discussions.body: Brandon Jill from Taste and Glow Balloonfest (3308 Green Pastures Lane) presented the grant request. He reported 11,000-12,000 attendees last year and announced that the competing Marshfield hot air balloon event was canceled due to permit issues, making them the sole hot air balloon event in the area. Commissioner Hodal questioned room tracking, noting the application showed 20 fewer rooms than last year. The commission approved a $5,000 grant matching last year's amount, with a request that the organization provide better hotel room data in their post-event report. Motion passed unanimously.

Renee reported on attending the Alice in Dairyland dinner at Red Rock Orchard in Edgar. She described meeting the candidates, noting the winner Anastasia had three bachelor's degrees. This was the first time the event was hosted in Marathon County since the 1970s. The candidates visited local attractions including Mullen's Cheese and expressed appreciation for the Marathon County community.

actionItems: Approved $5,000 grant to Taste and Glow Balloonfest for their annual event
Taste and Glow Balloonfest to provide hotel room usage data in post-event report
Next meeting scheduled for July 20th at 4:00 PM (tentative)
title: Tourism Commission
